# MuleSoft Azure Event Hubs Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Azure Event Hubs Connector documentation.
> See [Azure Event Hubs Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Event Hubs Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Event Hubs Connector 1.2 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/azure-event-hubs-connector-examples.md)
- [Azure Event Hubs Connector Reference 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/azure-event-hubs-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Azure Event Hubs Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/azure-event-hubs-connector-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshooting Azure Event Hubs Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/azure-event-hubs-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Azure Event Hubs Connector 1.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/azure-event-hubs-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Azure Event Hubs Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-event-hubs-connector/latest/index.md)
